pages.title: Requirements
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Minecraft$(): 1.21.1 $(li)$(bold)Mod Loader$(): NeoForge 21.1.221+ $(li)$(bold)Java$(): Java 21 (mandatory) $(li)$(bold)Dependencies$(): $(li)Compact Machines (see wiki) (required) $(li)Patchouli (see wiki) (required) - In-game documentation

pages.title: Installation Steps
pages.text: $(li)Install NeoForge for Minecraft 1.21.1 $(li)Download Compact Machines and place in `mods/` folder $(li)Download Patchouli and place in `mods/` folder $(li)Download FPSCompress and place in `mods/` folder $(li)Launch Minecraft
